title: Second night
notes: Live-prove milestone. The 4 M227 believability corrections confirmed rendering on billion. C2 render was defeated by a Next.js intercepting-route drawer (only the first sim per page-load is cleanly detected); the probe was hardened to prove each sim as 'the first' (RENDER_ONLY_SIM) for a clean 5/5. iter-03 also fixed F1/F2/F3 (FeedbackSeeder + SuccessionSeeder guard gap the deterministic M227 test missed, caught by the live re-prove). Reproducibility accepted on tik/tok evidence per user mandate.
